channel.title: Comments on: New Glarus, Totally Naked – Ep. 72
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: pvl
item.dc:creator: pvl
item.description: I would love to see you review more Wisconsin beers -- New Glarus, Capital, Lake Louie, etc etc
item.content:encoded: I would love to see you review more Wisconsin beers — New Glarus, Capital, Lake Louie, etc etc

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: I believe "Training Wheel Beer" is the term. Not to disparage the work New Glarus has done on this brew. Also, "all natural ingredients" doesn't say to me "brewed without adjuncts" like corn as Pink mentioned. Clarification may be in order. Thanks guys!!!
item.content:encoded: I believe “Training Wheel Beer” is the term. Not to disparage the work New Glarus has done on this brew. Also, “all natural ingredients” doesn’t say to me “brewed without adjuncts” like corn as Pink mentioned. Clarification may be in order. Thanks guys!!!
